title: lophodium foenisecii
intro: Lophodium foenisecii, also known as Witch's Hair, is a type of lichenized fungus that resembles hair or a tuft of grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lophodium foenisecii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the lichen is typically dried and crushed, then made into teas, infusions, or added to salves for topical application.
